_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for The Client Recovery SOP For Agencies. {palette} resolves at runtime.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words "Inter", "Inter Regular", "Inter Display Bold", "JetBrains Mono", "sans serif", or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character. Do not render the bracket characters as part of any word; only render the actual word text.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing more):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-left headline across three lines, smaller than typical hero (occupies upper third only): line 1 reads "The Client", line 2 reads "Recovery SOP", line 3 reads "For Agencies". Line 3 smaller, semi-transparent.
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel below the headline, one short line: 10 stages. 100 scripts. Save the account.
D. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

CENTRAL VISUAL (this is the hero of the cover, fills the middle and lower portions):
A stylized 10-stage recovery flow diagram, drawn with thin off-white #FAF9FF outlines on the indigo-to-purple background. The diagram is the dominant visual element, occupying roughly the bottom 60 percent of the cover.

The diagram structure:
- 10 rounded rectangle nodes arranged in two staggered horizontal rows: 5 nodes in the upper row, 5 nodes in the lower row, offset slightly so nodes alternate vertically as the eye reads left to right.
- Each node is a clean rounded rectangle with thin off-white outline and a translucent dark indigo fill. Nodes are uniform in size, not too large.
- A single continuous thin off-white line connects the 10 nodes left-to-right in a gentle wave or zigzag, with small arrow tips between each node showing flow direction.
- One node toward the right end (around node 8 or 9) has a soft bright cyan #06B6D4 glow ring around it, suggesting a critical moment in the recovery sequence.
- Above the diagram, three small parallel horizontal tracks of bright cyan #06B6D4 dotted lines run left to right (suggesting the three severity tiers routing through the stages). Tracks are subtle, not dominant.
- No text, no numbers, no labels inside or around any of the diagram elements. The diagram is pure visual structure.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Headline lines 1 and 2: large bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing. Smaller than a typical full-cover hero headline because the diagram is the visual centerpiece.
- Headline line 3: smaller medium-weight sans-serif, off-white at 75% opacity.
- Subtitle panel: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium funnel-art style with the diagram as the topic-specific centerpiece, echoing the system-illustration style of earlier playbook covers in this library.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, subtle bright cyan bloom upper right.
- Layout: headline + pill + subtitle panel in upper third, recovery-flow diagram dominates the middle and lower two-thirds, wordmark anchored bottom-left.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.
- No diagonal accent line; the diagram itself is the geometry.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No grid of small text pills (no WHAT IS INSIDE row). The diagram replaces that pattern.
- No literal brand logos. No emoji icons. No icons of phones, lifebuoys, handshakes, or calls.
- No human faces, no avatars, no illustrations of people.
- No code text rendered.
- No clip art, no realistic illustrations of laptops or screens.
- No text or numbering inside the 10 nodes; they are visual placeholders, not labeled.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page giving away "The Client Recovery SOP For Agencies". Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
- NO rendered text.
- No font names or typography labels.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third, soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same playbook design with 8 pill labels visible. On the left two-thirds: a faint repeating recovery-stages motif in #06B6D4 at 12 percent opacity (a horizontal sequence of 10 small rounded rectangles connected by thin arrow lines, suggesting a 10-stage process flow, with 3 small parallel tracks branching off each rectangle suggesting tier severity routing). A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan across the upper third.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with faint mesh gradient bloom.
- PDF mockup on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no phone icons, no chat bubble icons, no checkmark or X icons.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. Contains ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every word exactly as written.

TEXT TO RENDER:
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline two lines: line 1 reads "The Client Recovery SOP", line 2 reads "For Agencies". Line 2 should be smaller than line 1.
C. Below headline, off-white rounded subtitle pill, one line: 10 conversation stages, 100 scripted lines, 6 ready-to-send templates
D. Below subtitle pill, horizontal text strip with middle-dot separators: Damage Read · 10 Stages · Channels · Severity · Templates · Scorecard · 12 Mistakes · Fire Client
E. Bottom-right small label, faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline line 1: massive bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Headline line 2: smaller medium-weight sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside pill.
- Stages strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white 70%.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient 135 degrees, faded recovery-stages motif on the right third in bright cyan low opacity. Single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan upper third.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no chat bubble icons, no clip art, no emoji.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom upper right.
- Across the entire frame edge-to-edge, an abstract recovery-flow composition: a single horizontal sequence of 10 small rounded rectangle nodes spanning left to right, connected by thin off-white arrow lines, suggesting the 10-stage recovery process. Above and below the main sequence, three small parallel horizontal tracks of dotted lines suggesting tier severity routing. All clean off-white outlines on the indigo-to-purple background. Spread the structure to fill the frame edge-to-edge.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan from upper-left to mid-right.
- Subtle paper grain.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No brand logos of any kind.
- No text or labels inside any of the rectangles.
- No emoji, no clip art, no illustrations of people.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
